title: phleum exaratum subsp. aegaeum
intro: Phleum exaratum subsp. aegaeum, also known as the Aegean timothy grass or a subspecies of Phleum exaratum, is a type of perennial grass native to the Aegean Islands. This plant has been studied for its potential medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may contribute to its health benefits. The health benefits of Phleum exaratum subsp. aegaeum include the potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant may include infusions, decoctions, or extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
